infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: El Dorado Explorer uses your location to center the map on your current position and show wineries, farms, and restaurants near you — for example, finding the closest Apple Hill farm stand or Fair Play winery. Your location is only accessed while the app is open and is never stored or shared.
